overview: A mobile-optimized web app for Indian sugarcane farmers featuring AI-powered crop suitability predictions, detailed farming guides, prediction history, and full English/Marathi bilingual support with Material Design aesthetics.
features: Splash screen with green gradient and auto-navigation
Login and Register screens with form validation
Home dashboard with weather banner and navigation cards
Prediction form for temperature, humidity, rainfall, and soil type
Color-coded suitability results with planting and fertilizer recommendations
Detailed sugarcane farming guide with expandable sections
Prediction history with search and filter
Profile screen with edit and logout
